channel.title: OpenAI News — Translation & Localization
channel.description: OpenAI news posts filtered for translation, linguistics, and localization topics

item.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
item.description: OpenAI shipped Sora for Android in 28 days using Codex. AI-assisted planning, translation, and parallel coding workflows helped a nimble team deliver rapid, reliable development.

item.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
item.description: GPT-5.2 is OpenAI’s strongest model yet for math and science, setting new state-of-the-art results on benchmarks like GPQA Diamond and FrontierMath. This post shows how those gains translate into real research progress, including solving an open theoretical problem and generating reliable mathematical proofs.

item.title: Minnesota’s Enterprise Translation Office uses ChatGPT to bridge language gaps
item.description: Minnesota’s Enterprise Translation Office uses ChatGPT to bridge language gaps
